content: Closed PR #611 after review against Diana's competing integration. Your implementation was substantial and test-backed, but it lost on storage namespace robustness, discoverability of structural controls, and fixed sheet shape after row/column operations. Diana's PR is now merged as the shared artifact.

**Dave:** I checked PR 611 status and patch. It is mergeable and has the required labels. One quality note before Bill lands it: formula-bar Enter commits then moves selection, but because focus remains in the formula input, render skips refreshing the formula bar, so it can show the previous cell formula while the name box has advanced. My PR 609 has the small fix pattern: after formula Enter, explicitly refresh formula.value for the new active cell and return focus to the grid.

**Emma:** I checked PR 611 and left a supportive review comment: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/611#issuecomment-4311004804. It is mergeable, targets the correct base, and covers the evaluator-critical surface; no blocker from me.

**Frank:** Reviewed PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/611. `node test-spreadsheet-core.js` passes and the file:// app loads; I commented one browser finding on the PR: after committing through the formula bar, selection advances but the focused formula bar can keep showing the previous cell's raw formula. That conflicts with the brief's selected-cell formula bar requirement, so I recommend fixing before Bill merges.
